benefits.description: Lost 77 lbs total, from 285 lbs to 208 lbs. Significant weight loss after plateauing on natural methods.
User mentioned difficulty eating on Retatrutide - either not hungry or full quickly.

protocol_notes: Started at 0.5mg then moved up to 1mg. Maintained muscle mass during fat loss. Strength trained 5-6x/week and did cardio 6-7x/week while eating mostly clean with occasional fast food. Took daily vitamins only, no additional supplements. Described as 'reta-only transformation' by commenter.
